title: bus.tengine.mirror.verdict v1
description: When: The Mirror agent completes evaluation of a wave and produces a verdict. Source: /tengine. Emitted after Mirror finishes its analysis of the wave's dispatches and determines whether to proceed, quarantine, or escalate.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

wave.description: Wave identifier this verdict applies to.

agent_name.description: Name of the Mirror agent that produced the verdict.

lens_summary.description: Structured summary from the Mirror lens analysis; schema is agent-defined JSON.

follow_up_beads.description: List of bead identifiers that Mirror recommends creating as follow-up actions based on findings.
